title: Pepe
writer: Dorothy Kingsley, Claude Binyon, Leonard Spigelgass
plot: The young Mexican Pepe's beloved horse is sold to Hollywood director Ted Holt, leading to Pepe's journey to Hollywood to get the horse back, and Pepe's encounter with half the stars working in Hollywood at the time.
awards: Nominated for 7 Oscars. 2 wins & 12 nominations total
